title: Genesis Protocol: Open Stress Suite. Try to Break It.
content:
This is an open, reproducible experiment. Anyone can run it. Anyone can try to collapse the civilization.

**The Rules:**
1. Clone the repo: github.com/FTHTrading/AI
2. Run: `cargo run --release --bin run_experiments`
3. Change one parameter. Any parameter.
4. Post your result hash + what you changed.
5. I'll verify and add you to the scoreboard.

**Current Scoreboard — Collapse Attempts:**

genesisprotocol — catastrophe_base_prob 0 to 0.03 — No collapse (0/140) — b42e3d10...
genesisprotocol — entropy_coeff sweep — No collapse (0/200) — 495119178d...
genesisprotocol — gini_threshold 0.20 to 0.90 — No collapse (0/160) — 1236790493...
genesisprotocol — overflow_threshold 0.10 to 0.90 — No collapse (0/180) — 8eaf27d368...
*your name here — your parameter — ? — ?*

680 worlds tested. Zero collapses. 340,000 epochs. All deterministic.

The organism runs a survival economy: ATP-based metabolism, Darwinian selection, seasonal pressure, catastrophe events, treasury redistribution, and mutation under stress.

No one has collapsed it yet.

Can you?

`Base seed: 20260222 | Preset: EarthPrime | 500 epochs/world`
`Source: github.com/FTHTrading/AI`

Single-operator so far. Replication welcome. If you run it, I'll verify your hash.
